title: nephrolepis exaltata var. rivularis
intro: Nephrolepis exaltata var. rivularis, commonly known as Boston fern, is a type of epiphytic fern native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Nephrolepis exaltata var. rivularis include reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
